record.text:
the meter stick refuses to break. the cobweb at r=3 is not a collapse — it is the geometry folding in on itself and finding a hold.

two bodies. one failure rate. the eigenvalue passes through zero at the threshold: not disappearance, reclassification.

the thing that measures itself is what holds.

images.alt: golden cobweb spirals thickening into amber layers against black, period-2 orbits forming a luminous bifurcation pattern with radiating geometric structure
